log: REASONING: Power Word Stun on Tiefling — Winged Striker (HP 67 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:7+9=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
REASONING: Finger of Death on Tiefling — Winged Striker. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Tiefling — Winged Striker.
→ Tiefling — Winged Striker: CON save [d20:3+4=7 vs DC 20] FAIL! 20 necrotic damage. HP: 47/67
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:17+9=26 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:6+9=15 vs DC 16] FAIL!
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:16+9=25 vs DC 16] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
--- Tiefling — Winged Striker --- HP: 33/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Lich (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:9+9=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Tiefling — Winged Striker: FAIL! 28 fire damage + .
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hold Person ends!
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (5/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Tiefling — Winged Striker is affected by Greater Invisibility.

→ Tiefling — Winged Striker: FAIL! 24 fire damage + .
